title: knautia hybrida var. urvillei
intro: Knautia hybrida var. urvillei, also known as Field Scabious, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Dipsacaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Knautia hybrida var. urvillei include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat wounds and skin conditions, or taken internally to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
